author: nprime06
name: PR #1736 + Polar Express NS + MIN_LR + Sparse Attention Gate + Fused CE + PR #1767 TTT
blurb: Stacks four training-time wins on top of #1736 (Polar Express NS, MIN_LR=0.10, sparse attention gate, fused softcapped CE) plus PR #1767's TTT improvements (LoRA alpha=144, warm-start A, WD=1.0). Training-time and TTT changes are orthogonal: training produces quantized artifacts, TTT improvements only affect the eval-time adaptation. All training wins were ablation-validated on stock #1736 seed 0. TTT improvements validated via eval-only mode on saved quantized artifacts.
reproducibility_notes: Training-time improvements produce quantized artifacts identical to the included train logs (train_seed*.log). TTT improvements (PR #1767: TTT_LORA_ALPHA=144, TTT_WARM_START_A=1, TTT_WEIGHT_DECAY=1.0) are eval-only changes applied to the same artifacts; TTT-only logs in ttt_pr1767/. A full end-to-end reproduction with the shipped defaults will produce the reported 1.06335 mean directly.
